alerts.title: OpenClaw 2026.4.9 → 2026.4.11  (released 2026-04-12)
alerts.body:
🟡 Risk: MEDIUM — Review gateway/agent changes before updating

✅ Relevant to our setup:
  • Memory/wiki — could improve AlexI's long-term memory
  • Telegram — our primary channel — worth testing after update
  • Gateway — core infra — review release notes carefully
  • Agent runtime — affects how all our agents run
  • New embed tags — potentially useful for our HTML dashboard
  • WhatsApp — planned for Milestone 4
  • ChatGPT import — could migrate existing conversations to AlexI

❌ Not relevant for us: Feishu, Video generation

upcoming.title: Milestone 5: Chief of Staff — GTD Layer
